name: task
description: Execute a dual-agent consensus workflow for planning and/or implementation. Two AI agents (proposer + reviewer) iterate until consensus on a plan, then optionally execute it.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: The task description or code change request.

parameters.name: --full
parameters.description: Run full workflow: planning + implementation. This is the default.

parameters.name: --confirm
parameters.description: Plan first, then wait for user approval before implementing.

parameters.name: --claude-only
parameters.description: Use Claude Code for both proposer and reviewer agents.

parameters.name: --resume
parameters.description: Resume from an existing workspace directory.

parameters.name: --analysis-only
parameters.description: Resume workspace and run analysis only (sets --no-planning --no-implementation --analysis).

parameters.name: --in-place
parameters.description: Don't copy workspace on resume (modify in place).

parameters.name: --replay-streaming
parameters.description: Replay streamed output from previously completed phases.

parameters.name: --initial-plan
parameters.description: Load initial plan from file, skip the proposal phase.

returns: Workspace path containing plan and/or implementation outputs at _rankevolve_workspace/task_<timestamp>/.
examples: task "Implement flash attention v2 for HSTU model"
task --plan "Add unit tests for the recommendation service"
task --confirm "Refactor the data pipeline to use async I/O"
